breakout_products.title: 🚨 BREAKING: Warp just dropped its entire source code. 42,000 GitHub stars. Written in Rust. And i...
breakout_products.content: 🚨 BREAKING: Warp just dropped its entire source code. 42,000 GitHub stars. Written in Rust. And it just made the traditional terminal obsolete. This is not a terminal with AI features bolted on. This is an agentic development environment where coding agents operate with full autonomy. From issue to PR. No babysitting. Here's how it works: → You plug in Claude Code, Codex, or Gemini CLI → You give it a GitHub issue → The agent reads the codebase, writes the spec, implements the fix → It opens a PR with full context → You review and merge That's the entire workflow. No prompting. No copy-pasting. No hand-holding. Here's how far ahead they are: At build. warp. dev you can watch thousands of AI agents building Warp's own codebase. Live. Right now. Triaging real issues. Writing real code. Submitting real PRs. Click into any session. Watch the agent work in a real terminal. In your browser. They are building the product with the product. OpenAI is the founding sponsor. GPT powers the agentic management layer. The entire client is Rust-native and GPU-accelerated. Works on macOS, Linux, and Windows. Your terminal types commands. Warp ships features. 100% Open Source. AGPL-3.0 + MIT. (Link in the comments)
breakout_products.selection_reason: Warp terminal open-sourcing and major shift to agentic development environment.
breakout_products.summary: The GPU-accelerated terminal Warp has open-sourced its entire codebase, transforming into an autonomous development environment where AI agents can independently resolve GitHub issues and submit pull requests.
breakout_products.display_title: Warp Open-Sources Its Rust-Based Agentic Terminal Environment for Autonomous Coding Workflows
key_points: Developers can integrate models like Claude or Gemini to autonomously read codebases, implement fixes, and open pull requests without manual prompting.
The Rust-native, GPU-accelerated client is now fully open-source under AGPL-3.0 and MIT licenses across macOS, Linux, and Windows.
A live demonstration site currently showcases thousands of AI agents actively building and triaging issues for Warp's own codebase in real-time.

breakout_products.title: Microsoft Copilot Health
breakout_products.content: Dedicated space to bring your personal health data together. You've got data from your Oura, your hospital, your blood panels. None of it talks to each other. None of it tells you what to do. Copilot Health fixes that. It's a secure space inside Copilot where your health records (50,000+ US health systems), wearables (50+ devices), and lab results (via Function) come together. Medical AI analyzes the full picture and surfaces insights you can act on, grounded in sources like Harvard Health. Product categories: Medical.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Major Microsoft expansion into personal health data synthesis and AI analysis.
breakout_products.summary: This secure space within Microsoft Copilot aggregates fragmented personal health data from wearables, hospitals, and labs to provide actionable, AI-driven medical insights.
breakout_products.display_title: Microsoft Introduces Copilot Health to Unify Personal Medical Data and Wearable Insights
key_points: Integrates data from over 50,000 US health systems, 50 wearable devices, and various lab results.
Utilizes medical AI to analyze comprehensive health profiles and generate personalized recommendations.
Grounds its health insights in reputable medical sources such as Harvard Health to ensure reliability.

breakout_products.title: Someone just open-sourced shadcn-style map components for React. It's called mapcn. Theme-aware,...
breakout_products.content: Someone just open-sourced shadcn-style map components for React. It's called mapcn. Theme-aware, fully composable, and built on MapLibre GL so you get full mapping power without the Mapbox bill. 100% Open Source. https://t.co/67cRYGbXsa
breakout_products.selection_reason: New open-source React map component library with theme-aware features.
breakout_products.summary: Mapcn provides developers with theme-aware, fully composable React map components built on MapLibre GL to avoid expensive mapping bills.
breakout_products.display_title: Open-Source React Map Components Offer Shadcn-Style Design Without Mapbox Fees
key_points: Delivers fully composable, shadcn-style map components designed specifically for React applications.
Built on MapLibre GL to provide robust mapping capabilities without incurring Mapbox usage costs.
Features a completely open-source architecture that includes built-in theme awareness for seamless UI integration.

breakout_products.title: Scholé
breakout_products.content: Turn everyday work into personalized AI learning. Most AI learning is disconnected from the work people actually need to do. Scholé changes that by giving professionals and teams personalized, task-based learning in real time, right in the flow of work. Grounded in learning science and powered by adaptive AI, Scholé helps learners practice, improve, and apply AI skills as they work so learning is more relevant, more effective, and immediately useful. Product categories: Online learning.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Personalized AI learning tool integrated into professional workflows.
breakout_products.summary: This story centers on personalized AI learning tool integrated into professional workflows.
breakout_products.display_title: Personalized AI learning tool integrated into professional workflows
key_points: Turn everyday work into personalized AI learning.
Most AI learning is disconnected from the work people actually need to do.
Scholé changes that by giving professionals and teams personalized, task-based learning in real time, right in the flow of work.

breakout_products.title: Filect
breakout_products.content: Organize Your Files With AI. Filect automatically organizes your files into clean folder structures using AI. You can run it on autopilot or set custom rules, either way, your Desktop, Downloads, and Documents stay clean without lifting a finger. It can also find any specific file instantly. Just describe it in plain English "that invoice I made for client X last Tuesday" and Filect finds it in seconds. Built for creators, coders, designers, video editors, drowning in files. Mac and Windows. Free 10-day trial. Product categories: Search.
breakout_products.selection_reason: AI-powered file organization and natural language search for local storage.
breakout_products.summary: This story centers on aI-powered file organization and natural language search for local storage.
breakout_products.display_title: AI-powered file organization and natural language search for local storage
key_points: Organize Your Files With AI.
Filect automatically organizes your files into clean folder structures using AI.
You can run it on autopilot or set custom rules, either way, your Desktop, Downloads, and Documents stay clean without lifting a finger.

hot_news.title: Uber wants to turn its millions of drivers into a sensor grid for self-driving companies | TechCrunch
hot_news.content: Praveen Neppalli Naga, Uber's chief technology officer, revealed the plan in an interview at TechCrunch's StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, describing it as a natural extension of a nascent program the company announced in late January called AV Labs.
hot_news.selection_reason: Strategic Uber initiative to monetize driver data for autonomous vehicle training.
hot_news.summary: Uber's chief technology officer announced a strategy to leverage the company's vast network of drivers to collect sensor data for autonomous driving companies.
hot_news.display_title: Uber plans to utilize its driver network as a massive sensor grid for autonomous vehicle development
key_points: The initiative was revealed by Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga at a recent San Francisco event.
The data collection strategy is designed to support the development efforts of self-driving technology companies.
The project serves as an expansion of Uber's recently launched AV Labs program.

key_points: The new DeepSeek V2.5 model combines the capabilities of the previous Chat and Coder models.
API users can access the upgraded model using either the deepseek-coder or deepseek-chat endpoints.
This consolidation aims to provide backward compatibility while offering enhanced performance.

product_updates.title: 想让你的博客或网站的中文排版更优雅？ 可以让AI开发时参考这两个Github库： ① chinese-copywriting-guidelines，中英文之间的空格，标点符号要怎么用等等，15k...
product_updates.content: 想让你的博客或网站的中文排版更优雅？ 可以让AI开发时参考这两个Github库： ① chinese-copywriting-guidelines，中英文之间的空格，标点符号要怎么用等等，15k Star。 ② 赫蹏（hètí）是专为中文内容展示设计的排版样式增强。它基于通行的中文排版规范而来，可以为网站的读者带来更好的文章阅读体验。 地址见评论区

key_points: The chinese-copywriting-guidelines repository offers rules for punctuation and spacing between Chinese and English text.
The hètí repository provides typography style enhancements based on standard Chinese typesetting norms.
These resources can be used as references for AI during development to ensure a better reading experience.
